name: Math Modeling
description_en: End-to-end workflow for math-modeling competitions (CUMCM, MCM/ICM): topic selection, modeling, solving, paper writing, and final review.
description_zh: 数学建模竞赛(CUMCM 国赛 / MCM·ICM 美赛 / 电工杯)的端到端工作流:选题、建模、求解、论文写作与终稿审核。
long_en: A 10-phase, Q&A-driven workflow with per-stage rubric self-checks and cross-stage consistency passes, packaged for both Codex Skills and Claude Code.
long_zh: 10 阶段、问答式驱动的工作流,每阶段含 rubric 自评与跨阶段一致性回检,同时按 Codex Skills 与 Claude Code 形态打包。
sec_note_en: Guidance and code-gen for academic work; verify models and results, and follow your competition's honor code.
sec_note_zh: 面向学术工作的指导与代码生成;请核验模型与结果,并遵守竞赛诚信规则。
